name: Boss demoted me after I reported injury in Cottonwood Heights, illegal?

mainEntity.name: Boss demoted me after I reported injury in Cottonwood Heights, illegal?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, retaliation violates Utah law; report to Labor Commission.** Fines up to $5K.[1] Key factors: Link to claim timing. Document changes. Can't impede benefits. Seek legal help.
